title: dispatch_payment Vacant branch: address generation buried in 4-deep nesting
description: The address generation block inside Vacant is a match-within-match-within-match, 4 levels deep, ~80 lines. Each error path has an identical send_payment_message(Unknown) call. This makes it hard to follow the happy path. Rewrite as a helper: async fn generate_address(wallet_fvks: Option<&WalletFvks>, store: &WalletStore) -> Result<String, PaymentAction> returning Ok(ua) or Err(PaymentAction::Unknown{reason}) — the Vacant branch becomes a flat match on the result. All 4 error-path send_payment_message calls collapse into one.
